subject: [PATCH 4/6 v3] mm/memcontrol: convert memcg to use page_counter_stock

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch converts memcg to use page_counter_stock, removing special casing for !allow_spinning and allowing page_counter_alloc_stock() to fail if memory is insufficient. It also restructures drain_all_stock to iterate CPUs in the outer loop, reducing synchronous per-CPU work calls from O(memcgs * CPUs) to just O(CPUs). The changes do not affect obj_stock or memsw stock, which will be handled separately.
